creator: csl@whale.sunbay.crimea.ua
text:
After introducing new displays for TCP, ICMP, IP statistic it's impossible
to select TCP connections in a netstat window because "tcp" means TCP status
display now.

Fix: 

Assign different name either to protocol selection in netstat window
or to TCP statistic window. Personally I've renamed "tcp" to "stattcp"
for TCP statistic.
How-To-Repeat: 
run systat -n, type ":tcp", what are you expecting? somebody wants tcp
connections.
